description:
A regulatory authority has requested a compliance dossier for a specific aircraft in the Aerobridge drone registry. Your job is to navigate the Aerobridge Django admin panel, look up the target aircraft and all its related records (manufacturer, operator, type certificate), and compile the information into a structured text report.

**Admin Credentials:**
- URL: http://localhost:8000/admin/
- Username: admin
- Password: adminpass123

**Instructions:**
1. Read the file /home/ga/dossier_assignment.txt to find out which aircraft to investigate
2. Log into the Django admin at http://localhost:8000/admin/
3. Navigate to Registry > Aircrafts and find the target aircraft
4. Click on the aircraft to view its full details
5. Record the aircraft's: model, mass, ICAO aircraft type designator, registration mark, sub-category, and status
6. Click through to the linked Manufacturer record and note the manufacturer full name and country
7. Check if a Type Certificate is linked; if so, record its ID
8. Check if an Operator company is linked; if so, record the company name and country
9. Compile all information into a report saved at /home/ga/aircraft_dossier.txt

**Required report format:**
